pi_items.source: Task instruction explicitly defines the target URL.
Task description and export_result.sh bash scripts.
Task description and export_result.sh bash scripts.
Directly downloaded and inspected the target Wikimedia Commons page HTML and the full JPEG EXIF metadata. The camera model is completely missing from both, contradicting the metadata claim.
Directly downloaded and inspected the target Wikimedia Commons page HTML and the full JPEG EXIF metadata. The exposure time is completely missing from both, contradicting the metadata claim.
Task description and export_result.sh explicitly expect this string.

privileged_info_summary: The task explicitly defines the target URL, output file paths, and bookmark title requirements. However, the requirement to extract 'Canon', '5D', and '1/250' exposure time is contradicted by the actual live data: the target Wikimedia Commons page and image file do not contain this camera model or exposure EXIF data, as the metadata was historically stripped.
